Implemented and verified
Fixed: applyRoleUi() was redirecting away from start-only pages unconditionally on every loadStatus() call. Added !start guard so start gates stay on peer-tools page after executing commands.
Implemented and verified
Implemented and verified: UI now edits triggerDelta above rolling baseline, /api/config/time applies triggerDelta immediately, docs/OpenAPI and tests updated, npm test and make build pass.

Implemented and verified: physical NFC scanning now runs during active stages and accepts only newly presented tags, so same-rider re-swipe reaches existing cancellation logic without held-tag immediate cancel. npm test and make build pass.

Implemented and verified: embed script now minifies safe text formats, gzips embedded UI/docs assets, firmware serves them with Content-Encoding gzip, generated device_ui.h shrank from about 666 KB to 161 KB, flash use dropped to 47.7%, npm test/typecheck and make build pass.

Implemented and verified: same-card re-scan now logs cancellation, clears active state, stops buzzer/baseline, and immediately removes the active run from RunQueue so it is stopped and deleted. Added static regression coverage. npm test and make build pass.

Implemented and verified: removed manual Trigger Delta Above Baseline card, save button, and related JS handlers from normal Gate Config UI. Auto Calibration remains visible and triggerDelta stays in config/API/backup restore. Regenerated embedded UI. npm test and make build pass.

Added Monitor > Files UI for LittleFS browsing and read-only viewing. Added GET /api/files and GET /api/files/view firmware endpoints with path normalization and capped file reads. Regenerated embedded UI. Verified npm test and make build.

Implemented all 5 changes: (A) sensorTriggered() resets sensorAboveCount on ADC rail rejection, (B) DEBOUNCE_COUNT reverted to 3, (C) voltage/baseline/threshold logged each countdown second, (D) voltage logged on false start and real trigger, (E) calibration idle/press phases log every 10th sample. Build clean, 21/21 tests pass, flashed to device.

Sensor working on GPIO4. ADC saturation detection, baseline self-correction during idle, bidirectional trigger, calibration rail check updated. Verified: calibration SUCCESS (delta=0.39V), countdown with no false starts, trigger at 0.400s reaction time.
Implemented transactional ESP-NOW rider sync validation with peer acknowledgements and verified with npm test plus firmware build.
Removed Check Clock and made Clock Sync perform initial ESP-NOW check, peer update, and tolerance-confirmed peer acknowledgement.
Moved Network Status from Monitor/Results to the top of Network configuration and verified with tests/build.
Removed browser Auto Calibration UI, browser calibration HTTP endpoints, peer calibrate command UI/API, and updated tests/docs while preserving diagnostic firmware calibration internals.

Implemented: auto-refresh (2s interval), Delete All (firmware clearAllRuns + RunQueue::clear, UI confirm dialog), NFC swipe time from device boot epoch, results-disappear fix (keep content on fetch error), queuedAtMs added to live and persisted run JSON
All firmware, API and UI changes implemented. Build clean, 24/24 tests pass, pushed.

Completed by dual-trigger wheel-track implementation: start/finish rear-wheel detection, wheel-lift timeout handling, configurable wheel-track settings, UI/result support, and related tests are present.
Resolved: in-page API Docs viewer is implemented in the device UI, visible docs are served by firmware routes, and static tests cover the doc link/route contract.
Completed: gate trigger feedback now uses distinct tones for valid post-GO triggers and pre-GO false starts.

Implemented firmware line-2 timing path via dual-trigger wheel tracking: second start-gate sensor trigger now calls RunQueue::stampLine2(), logs line2_triggered, launchMs is covered by static tests, AGENTS ground truth updated, npm test and make build pass.

Implemented buffered I/O in handleGetFileView, tailJsonl, getSessionFile, and getRunsJson inner loop. Added session cache with invalidation in begin() and pruneOldSessions(). Build clean, 25/25 tests pass.
